scripts.prebuild:version: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); const ts=new Date().toISOString(); const out = 'export const WORKER_VERSION = ' + JSON.stringify(pkg.version) + ';\n' + 'export const DEPLOYED_AT = ' + JSON.stringify(ts) + ';\n'; fs.writeFileSync('./src/version.generated.js', out);"
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run prebuild:version && wrangler deploy
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run prebuild:version && wrangler deploy
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run prebuild:version && wrangler deploy
